productDisplayName: Rockport Men OC Plaintoe Black Formal Shoes
description: Designed for the man who never compromises on style and comfort, this oxford leather shoe from rockport makes for a great addition to your formal winter wardrobe. UpperSoft leather upper Lacing system for a snug, customised FitadiPRENE inserts in the footbed for a custom fit and impact protectionRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePU midsole for all day comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with textured lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves for ease of movementRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
